title: Show HN: TikZ Editor – WYSIWYG editor for figures in LaTeX
summary: TikZ Editor 是一个开源的所见即所得编辑器，支持通过拖拽和调整大小来可视化编辑 LaTeX 图形代码。
translated_summary: TikZ Editor is an open-source WYSIWYG editor that allows visual editing of LaTeX figure code by dragging and resizing elements, with synchronized source and rendered views.
